about_fund.title: About the Foundation
about_fund.subtitle: Charitable Foundation «Mercy and Health»
about_fund.history_text: Charitable Foundation «Mercy and Health» was established in response to Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022. The founders — activists, entrepreneurs, and veterans — united to systematically support the army and affected civilians.
about_fund.mission_text: Our mission is comprehensive support for Ukraine's defenders and societal recovery: from supplying the army with necessary equipment to rehabilitating the wounded and providing psychological support to their families.

values.title: Reliability
values.text: Transparent reporting and responsible use of every donated dollar

values.title: Teamwork
values.text: Volunteers, partners, and donors — one united team

values.title: Care
values.text: Every request represents a human story — and we never forget that

values.title: Transparency
values.text: Regular reports and open finances for every donor

rehab_center.title: Rehabilitation Center
rehab_center.subtitle: Restoring Body and Spirit
rehab_center.mission: Psychological and physical rehabilitation of military personnel and their families — a path to returning to civilian life

services.title: Psychological Support
services.description: Individual and group sessions with experienced psychologists. Work with PTSD, anxiety, and depression

services.title: Physical Rehabilitation
services.description: Recovery from injuries and physical exhaustion. Exercise therapy, massage, physiotherapy

services.title: Family Support
services.description: Psychological help for spouses, parents, and children of military personnel

services.title: Children's Support
services.description: Specialized work with children of fallen and wounded soldiers. Teen Club program

mobile_groups.title: Mobile Psychological Groups
mobile_groups.subtitle: Field support in 4 regions of Ukraine

reports.title: Reports & Transparency
reports.subtitle: We are open and accountable to every donor

donate_page.title: Donation Details
donate_page.subtitle: Every amount matters — together we win

faq.a: 100% of raised funds go directly to project implementation. Administrative costs are covered separately through partners and grants.

faq.q: How can I get donation confirmation?
faq.a: After receiving your transfer, we send confirmation to your email. All expenses are also reflected in our quarterly reports.

faq.q: Can I make a recurring donation?
faq.a: Yes! You can set up recurring transfers through your bank or Monobank. This is the most convenient way to systematically support our foundation.
Yes, we are an officially registered charitable foundation under Ukrainian law. All documents are available on the 'About Us' page.
